revision.comment: start
revision.text: {{#switch:{{lc:{{{class}}}}} |fa |a |ga |b |c |start |stub = article |fl |list = list |image|file = file |category|cat|categ = category |disambig|disamb|dab = disambiguation page |portal = portal page |template|temp|templ = template |project = project page |redirect|redir = redirect |#default={{#switch:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |User = user page |Mediawiki = interface page |Help = help page |File = file |Category = category |Portal = portal page |Template = template |Wikipedia = project page |<!--NULL--> = article |#default = page }} }}

revision.comment: use ns and reorder
revision.text: {{#switch:{{lc:{{{class}}}}} |fa |a |ga |b |c |start |stub = article |fl |list = list |image|file = file |category|cat|categ = category |disambig|disamb|dab = disambiguation page |portal = portal page |template|temp|templ = template |project = project page |redirect|redir = redirect |#default={{#switch:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{ns:0}} = article |{{ns:2}} = user page |{{ns:Project}} = project page |{{ns:File}} = file |{{ns:MediaWiki}} = interface page |{{ns:Template}} = template |{{ns:Help}} = help page |{{ns:Category}} = category |{{ns:Portal}} = portal page |#default = page }} }}

revision.comment: for non-articles in mainspace
revision.text: {{#switch:{{lc:{{{class}}}}} |fa |a |ga |b |c |start |stub = article |fl |list = list |image|file = file |category|cat|categ = category |disambig|disamb|dab = disambiguation page |portal = portal page |template|temp|templ = template |project = project page |redirect|redir = redirect |#default={{#switch:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{ns:0}} = {{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{class|}}}}}|na|page|article}} |{{ns:2}} = user page |{{ns:Project}} = project page |{{ns:File}} = file |{{ns:MediaWiki}} = interface page |{{ns:Template}} = template |{{ns:Help}} = help page |{{ns:Category}} = category |{{ns:Portal}} = portal page |#default = page }} }}

revision.comment: namespace takes precedence
revision.text: {{#switch:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{ns:0}} = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{class}}}}} |fa |a |ga |b |c |start |stub |#default = article |fl |list = list |image|file = file |category|cat|categ = category |disambig|disamb|dab = disambiguation page |portal = portal page |template|temp|templ = template |project = project page |redirect|redir = redirect |na = page }} |{{ns:2}} = user page |{{ns:Project}} = project page |{{ns:File}} = file |{{ns:MediaWiki}} = interface page |{{ns:Template}} = template |{{ns:Help}} = help page |{{ns:Category}} = category |{{ns:Portal}} = portal page |#default = page }}

revision.comment: lists are articles
revision.text: {{#switch:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{ns:0}} = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{class}}}}} |fa |a |ga |b |c |start |stub |fl |list |#default = article |image|file = file |category|cat|categ = category |disambig|disamb|dab = disambiguation page |portal = portal page |template|temp|templ = template |project = project page |redirect|redir = redirect |na = page }} |{{ns:2}} = user page |{{ns:Project}} = project page |{{ns:File}} = file |{{ns:MediaWiki}} = interface page |{{ns:Template}} = template |{{ns:Help}} = help page |{{ns:Category}} = category |{{ns:Portal}} = portal page |#default = page }}

revision.comment: use unnamed parameter
revision.text: {{#switch:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{ns:0}} = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{1|}}}}} |fa |a |ga |b |c |start |stub |fl |list |#default = article |image|file = file |category|cat|categ = category |disambig|disamb|dab = disambiguation page |portal = portal page |template|temp|templ = template |project = project page |redirect|redir = redirect |na = page }} |{{ns:2}} = user page |{{ns:Project}} = project page |{{ns:File}} = file |{{ns:MediaWiki}} = interface page |{{ns:Template}} = template |{{ns:Help}} = help page |{{ns:Category}} = category |{{ns:Portal}} = portal page |#default = page }}

revision.comment: don't normalise here
revision.text: {{#switch:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{ns:0}} = {{#switch:{{{1|}}} |FA |A |GA |B |C |Start |Stub |FL |List |#default = article |Image|File = file |Category = category |Disambig = disambiguation page |Portal = portal page |Template = template |Project = project page |Redirect = redirect |NA = page }} |{{ns:2}} = user page |{{ns:Project}} = project page |{{ns:File}} = file |{{ns:MediaWiki}} = interface page |{{ns:Template}} = template |{{ns:Help}} = help page |{{ns:Category}} = category |{{ns:Portal}} = portal page |#default = page }}

revision.comment: remove classes in wrong namespace
revision.text: {{#switch:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{ns:0}} = {{#switch:{{{1|}}} |FA |A |GA |B |C |Start |Stub |FL |List |#default = article |Disambig = disambiguation page |Redirect = redirect |NA = page <!--|Image|File = file |Category = category |Portal = portal page |Template = template |Project = project page--> }} |{{ns:2}} = user page |{{ns:Project}} = project page |{{ns:File}} = file |{{ns:MediaWiki}} = interface page |{{ns:Template}} = template |{{ns:Help}} = help page |{{ns:Category}} = category |{{ns:Portal}} = portal page |#default = page }}

revision.comment: Protected Template:WPBannerMeta/pagetype: [[WP:HRT|Highly visible template]] ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{#switch:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{ns:0}} = {{#switch:{{{1|}}} |FA |A |GA |B |C |Start |Stub |FL |List |#default = article |Disambig = disambiguation page |Redirect = redirect |NA = page <!--|Image|File = file |Category = category |Portal = portal page |Template = template |Project = project page--> }} |{{ns:2}} = user page |{{ns:Project}} = project page |{{ns:File}} = file |{{ns:MediaWiki}} = interface page |{{ns:Template}} = template |{{ns:Help}} = help page |{{ns:Category}} = category |{{ns:Portal}} = portal page |#default = page }}

revision.comment: use page for all two-word descriptions
moved [[Template:WPBannerMeta/pagetype]] to [[Template:Pagetype]]
emphasise that blank class yields "article"
needs some documentation
use "article" for subjectspace pages
revision.text: {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}} |{{ns:Talk}} = {{#switch:{{{1|}}} |FA |A |GA |B |C |Start |Stub |FL |List |<!--NULL--> |#default = article |Disambig |Redirect |NA = page <!--|Image|File = file |Category = category |Portal = page |Template = template |Project = page--> }} |{{ns:User talk}} |{{ns:MediaWiki talk}} |{{ns:Help talk}} |{{ns:Portal talk}} |{{ns:Project talk}} = page |{{ns:File talk}} = file |{{ns:Template talk}} = template |{{ns:Category talk}} = category |#default = article<!--Yields "article" on non-talk pages--> }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: simplify
pp-template
replace normalisation
use class to determine output on subject pages
parameter unnamed
+na
accept optional page parameter
add subjectspace parameter
+book
+disambiguation
remove {{pp-template}}
add Module talk
add TimedText talk
update from sandbox to handle non-talk pages better
switch to Lua version at [[Module:Pagetype]]
revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#invoke:pagetype|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Pagetype: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: allow template editors ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#invoke:pagetype|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Pagetype: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: With more than 5.5 million transclusions and cascade protections this should be full protected as well ([Edit=Allow only administrators] (indefinite) [Move=
revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#invoke:pagetype|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on

revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#invoke:pagetype|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>
